title: Specialist Product Marketing and Sales Activation (m/w/d)
required_skills: Degree in Business, Marketing or equivalent
matched_skills: Portfolio gap analysis and competitive analysis
missing_skills: Business-fluent German (candidate has B1+; JD requires verhandlungssicher ~B2/C1)
Explicit forecasting and demand planning experience
B2C / consumer marketing background (candidate is primarily B2B)
Pricing strategy and business case ownership
Direct sales channel or direct-selling model experience
core_responsibilities: Strategic and operational revenue development for product portfolio (direct sales + consumer e-commerce)
Development of integrated product, campaign, and revenue strategies for Beauty Consultants and end-customer business
Pricing, portfolio analysis, and business cases
Close coordination with Dallas HQ and internal stakeholders (management, finance, supply chain, sales & marketing)
recommended_emphasis: Highlight B2B-to-B2B2C bridge: position GTM and campaign strategy work as directly transferable to beauty consultant channel activation
Quantify revenue impact: emphasize the 4.6M CNY signed contracts and USD 8M budget tracking to demonstrate commercial ownership
Showcase portfolio analysis and business case experience from GRG Banking (portfolio gap analysis, market segmentation)
Stress e-commerce analytics skills from Moli Media to cover the consumer e-commerce dimension of the role
Demonstrate German language improvement trajectory or note German proficiency in professional contexts to mitigate the B1+ gap
risk_flags: German language gap: JD requires business-fluent German (verhandlungssicher); candidate currently at B1+ which may be a hard filter
B2C experience thin: role covers consumer e-commerce and beauty consultant end-customer business; candidate background is predominantly B2B
No cosmetics/FMCG/beauty industry experience; category knowledge may be expected

company_info.size_raw: Multimilliarden Dollar Unternehmen, 40+ Länder (no explicit headcount in JD)
